judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a newspaper clipping as a visual element, but Description B adds specific title text and positional detail that Description A omits without contradiction.
original_image_tags: * A clipping of a newspaper article is pasted onto the main page. The main page has several stamps and handwritten notes.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned archival page with a pasted newspaper clipping titled “Saucers Here, Saucers There— Including Washington” and “There Were Three—Shaped Like Dishes,” plus handwritten “flying discs” at top, a typed name list on the right, and FBI-style “RECORDED” stamp with file markings and signatures at lower right.*
